message:
Add timer unref and improve WebSocket message handling

Backend services - timer unref for graceful shutdown:
- context-health.service.ts: Add .unref() to monitoring interval
- graph-bridge.ts: Add .unref() to poll interval
- job.service.ts: Add .unref() to poll interval
- Allows process to exit cleanly without waiting for timers

websocket-context.tsx - Improved message handling:
- Add explicit type annotations for parsed WebSocket data
- Handle hub envelope format: { type: "message", message: HubMessage }
- Extract channel/payload from nested message structure
- Send ack for hub messages when ackRequired is true
- Use strict equality checks (=== true) for boolean fields
- Use typeof checks for string fields
- Silently catch handler errors to prevent propagation

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
